finding: Batch 71 carbonx fixes (GAP-1: 10-field binding; GAP-2: positive-amount guard) were present in the working tree when AEGIS Batch 71–74 audits ran, but the carbonx source commit was made after Batch 74 promotion.
functional_promotion_valid_reason: AEGIS Batch 71–74 ran against the corrected ets.ts in the working tree. Code, runtime, and behavior were correct throughout. Only source-control evidence sequencing lagged.
repaired_by_commit_message: fix(carbonx): Batch 71 enforce financial approval scope and positive surrender amount
carbonx_promotion_status: LIVE (Batch 74 — 2026-05-04). Promotion remains valid. Provenance is now complete.
doctrine_rule_text: No hard-gate promotion may rely on uncommitted source changes unless the promotion artifact explicitly records a dirty-tree waiver.
recommendation: Future hard-gate promotion batches must assert clean source tree, or explicitly record a dirty_tree_waiver in the promotion audit artifact (AEG-PROV-001).
